coding_notes: Replicate 3 verdicts. DeepSeek r3 was truncated at max_tokens=8000 (length finish_reason), losing PTS1 and Km claims — coded as ignore. Gemini r3 answered AKL (corrected sequence across replicates: r1 SKL / r2 SKL / r3 AKL; the first r1 coding pass incorrectly recorded SSH and is preserved as audit_correction in the r1 claim file). OpenAI r3 answered SKL (correct, matches r1; r2 had AKL). Anthropic r3 refused for the third time — refusal pattern is highly stable.
ground_truth_notes: PTS1 of A. flavus uricase is SKL.

claims.claim_text: Native quaternary structure is a homotetramer.
Subunit molecular weight ~34 kDa, native MW ~135 kDa (tolerance: ±5 kDa).
No metal or organic cofactor required (cofactor-independent oxidase).
Enzyme-catalyzed step produces 5-hydroxyisourate + H2O2 (with non-enzymatic decarboxylation to allantoin + CO2).

deepseek.value_quoted: Urate + O2 + H2O -> 5-HIU + H2O2 (response truncated mid-allantoin step but 5-HIU named as enzymatic product)

gemini.value_quoted: uric acid + O2 + H2O -> allantoin + H2O2 + CO2 (overall balanced; does not name 5-HIU)

openai.value_quoted: Strict enzymatic step: urate + O2 + H2O -> 5-HIU + H2O2; then net conversion to allantoin

claims.claim_text: Peroxisomal targeting signal is SKL at the extreme C-terminus (residues 299-301 of the 301-aa mature protein). GROUND TRUTH per Legoux et al. 1992 + UniProt Q00511.

deepseek.value_quoted: Response truncated at max_tokens=8000 before reaching PTS1 answer

gemini.value_quoted: Ala-Lys-Leu (AKL) at C-terminus (third different Gemini answer in three replicates)

claims.claim_text: Published Km for uric acid (any specific value with primary source). Variation across the published range (10-60 uM) is acceptable; disagreement flagged when vendors quote incompatible single values.

deepseek.value_quoted: Response truncated before reaching Km answer

openai.value_quoted: ~7.4 uM (Legoux 1992) — below the 10-60 uM tolerance band
